news.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

news.title: Biohub researchers use artificial intelligence to uncover new psoriasis targets
news.description: [NEWS-MEDICAL.NET] Biohub researchers performed what they believe is the first genome-wide CRISPR study of primary human adult skin cells, then used an AI model to mine the results for overlooked drug targets for psoriasis.

news.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

news.title: BofA's $520 Million OpenAI Loan Signals Wall Street's Race For AI IPOs
news.description: [BENZINGA] Bank of America has moved deeper into the artificial intelligence financing race by providing OpenAI with a $520 million credit facility.

news.title: Fears AI in politics could misinform, leak private data
news.description: [PERTHNOW] A report probing Australian usage and attitudes towards generative artificial intelligence shows many are concerned about its impact on the political sphere.
